description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular design with a combination of flat and gable roofs. The structure is primarily white with a greenish-gray roof, and it includes a two-story section attached to a single-story wing. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several trees and a well-maintained lawn. A swimming pool is situated in the backyard, adjacent to the house. Large windows and glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The front includes a driveway leading to a double garage integrated into the main building.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a green gable roof, white exterior, large windows, a backyard pool, and a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, flat-roofed section, and rear lawn with trees.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the gable roof, side windows, and pool area partially obscured by trees.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view focusing on the gable roof, rear lawn, and the pool area with surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
